message:
refactor(workflows): extract descriptors and filesystem loading to descriptors.rs [ft-c45am]

Extracts Data-Driven Workflow Descriptors section (~847 lines) including
DescriptorLimits, DescriptorTrigger, DescriptorFailureHandler, WorkflowDescriptor,
DescriptorMatcher, DescriptorControlKey, DescriptorStep, DescriptorWorkflow,
load_workflows_from_dir, and default_workflow_dir into workflows/descriptors.rs.

mod.rs: 20,348 → 19,501 lines. All 57 descriptor tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
